terms.title: MyTour terms & policy
terms.welcome: Welcome to MyTour, your travel booking partner. MyTour is operated and owned by Dinno CJSC, a company registered and based in Armenia. Our goal is to connect travelers with trusted tour operators,making booking smooth, transparent and support easy.
terms.agreement: When you use our platform, you agree to the following terms, along with the specific conditions set by the individual travel providers you book with.
terms.policyIntro: This policy is here to help you understand how MyTour works and how your data is used.
terms.booking.title: Booking through MyTour
terms.booking.intro: When you confirm a booking on MyTour, you're entering into two agreements:
terms.booking.mytourConditions: With us (MyTour / Dinno JSC): for using our platform, managing your reservation, and accessing support.
terms.booking.providerConditions: With the travel provider (tour agency, hotel, or other service): for the actual delivery of the travel service you've booked.
terms.booking.thirdParty: Each hotel, tour, or package listed on MyTour is offered by a third-party provider, and each provider sets its own:
terms.booking.specificTerms: You'll find the specific terms for each provider directly on their product page, clearly marked before checkout. By completing a booking, you confirm that you've reviewed and accepted both our terms and the provider's.
terms.payments.title: Payments, changes & cancellations
terms.payments.booking.payment: Payments are processed securely, either upfront or in stages depending on the provider's policy.
terms.payments.booking.cancellation: Cancellations and changes follow the provider's policy, which varies by product and how close you are to the departure/check-in date.
terms.payments.refund.title: Refunds: if you're eligible for a refund:
terms.payments.refund.text: Refunds: if you're eligible for a refund:
terms.payments.refund.conditions: The timeline and amount depend on the provider's cancellation terms. We process refunds promptly once we receive confirmation from the provider. In some cases, service fees may not be refundable — we'll always let you know upfront.
terms.payments.refund.management: You can usually manage changes and cancellations through your MyTour account, and if needed, our support team is here to help coordinate with the provider.
terms.traveler.title: Traveler responsibility
terms.traveler.confirmation: As the person making the booking, you confirm that:
terms.traveler.confirmation.age: You're 18 years or older and authorized to book on behalf of all travelers listed.
terms.traveler.confirmation.requirements: All travelers meet entry, visa, health, or destination-specific requirements.
terms.traveler.confirmation.terms: You've reviewed the details and terms of the travel provider before finalizing your booking.
terms.personalData.title: Personal data & how it's used
terms.personalData.intro: When booking with MyTour, we collect certain personal information to fulfill your reservation and provide service. This includes your:
terms.personalData.collected.travel: Travel preferences and passport/ID details (if required), and
terms.personalData.collected.others: Information about any other travelers in your booking.
terms.personalData.access.title: Who we share it with
terms.personalData.access.providers: Travel providers (e.g., hotels, tour agencies, local operators) receive your details so they can confirm and deliver your booking.
terms.personalData.access.payment: Payment processors receive only what's needed to complete the transaction securely.
terms.personalData.access.partners: Service providers (e.g. email tools, analytics platforms) help us improve your experience.
terms.personalData.sharing: When booking with MyTour, you agree that your and your companions' data will be shared with the relevant provider to complete the booking.
terms.personalData.usage: We may also use the data for:
terms.liability.title: Liability & service limitations
terms.liability.intro: While we carefully select and verify the providers we list, the actual delivery of services (e.g., running the tour or managing the hotel stay) is outside of MyTour's control.
terms.liability.responsibility: We are not liable for changes, cancellations, or issues caused by the travel provider or circumstances beyond their control (such as weather, strikes, or global events). Our responsibility is limited to the amount paid through our platform, and we'll always do our best to support and assist you in resolving issues.
terms.updates.title: Updates to terms
terms.updates.text: These terms may be updated occasionally. Once published on our website, the new version becomes valid and considered effective. Customers are deemed notified as soon as the updated terms are live on the site.
terms.support.title: Questions or support
terms.support.intro: Need help before, during, or after your booking?
terms.support.contact: Reach out to our support team through 033 320050— we're happy to assist
